introduced_by_correction: Assembler Preparation Layer correction and Contract Layer / API Boundary correction
must_provide: Must compose accepted content, metadata injection, timestamp stabilization, optional validating-path validation, and Log Level Envelope realization before server-side admission.
must_not_do: Must not be collapsed into raw Level API, generic preparation layer, queue runtime object, or runtime COM contract layer.
notes: Canonical client-side contract object injected into or composed by the Level API side before Log Level Envelope admission.

must_provide: Must receive the realized Log Level Envelope into the assembler-side admission path and preserve consuming/boundary separation.
must_not_do: Must not admit raw content as the final runtime carrier and must not replace Envelope Assembler composition responsibility.
notes: Canonical server-side receiving surface for Log Level Envelope entry into assembler internals.

introduced_by_correction: Administrative/control path correction and Three Surface Law preservation
must_provide: Must receive policy bundles, metadata directives, and operational directives through administrative/ecosystem authority.
must_not_do: Must not collapse into consuming content ingress or into managerial runtime execution surface.
notes: Canonical administrative/ecosystem boundary for non-content control inputs.

introduced_by_correction: Registry abstraction and delivery boundary correction
must_provide: Must expose registry-facing readiness, admission, handoff, and lifecycle-transfer contract surfaces.
must_not_do: Must not replace Dispatcher as final assembler-side handoff actor and must not imply registry-internal ownership.
notes: Canonical outbound registry-facing contract surface paired with Dispatcher but not replacing it.

introduced_by_correction: Carrier realization and envelope lifecycle correction
must_provide: Must act as authoritative runtime carrier for accepted content, metadata, and stabilized timestamp.
must_not_do: Must not be replaced by raw content, treated as Queue Container Identifier, or treated as lifecycle-owned by Envelope Slot Occupancy.
notes: Major carrier object; governed, moved, occupied, and handed off, but not an actor.

must_provide: Must provide compact delivery-cycle state updates including readiness/not-ready, success, failure, refusal, backpressure, local reset required, and queue requalification required flags.
must_not_do: Must not contain detailed diagnostic/reporting payloads and must not be conflated with Dispatcher Feedback Report.
notes: Expanded by seven sub-responsibilities under RSP-CAN-025 / OBL-CAN-025.

must_provide: Must provide detailed diagnostic/reporting artifacts for delivery attempt, failure, refusal, backpressure, and post-delivery reset contexts.
must_not_do: Must not be treated as compact delivery-cycle state and must not replace Delivery-Cycle Flag Set.
notes: Expanded by five sub-responsibilities under RSP-CAN-048 / OBL-CAN-048.
